title: rand() only gets evaluated once when used as an expression
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value REAL DEFAULT (RANDOM() % 1000) / 1000.0);
SELECT id, value + (RANDOM() % 1000) / 1000.0 AS random_value FROM test_table;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN new_value INTEGER DEFAULT (RANDOM() % 1000);
key_bug_features: rand() evaluated only once in expressions
